records.ety: [L. astringere; ad + stringere to draw tight. Cf. Astrict, and see Strain, v. t.]
records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Astringed (-trnjd"); p. pr. & vb. n. Astringing (-jng).]

defs: To bind fast; to constrict; to contract; to cause parts to draw together; to compress.
quotes: Which contraction . . . astringeth the moisture of the brain and thereby sendeth tears into the eyes.

defs: To bind by moral or legal obligation.
